text.title: bundle-vs-split-tools Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for bundle-vs-split-tools as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Anti-example bundle: exec(mode: "git"|"npm"|"docker"|"http", subcommand: str, args: list[str])
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The audiences (git, npm, docker, http) are completely different. Model gets confused; tool-selection error rate spikes. Better as four separate tools. Splitting reduced error from 18% to 4% in a real case.
